summary: P10 app/module/runtime UI has passed FE-016, FE-017, FE-018, TEST-008, VAL-006 and REV-006. Applications, modules, fields, page config, publish and runtime records are now real browser-usable pages, not contract-only models. Full project deployability remains false until P11/P12 complete the remaining visual usable domains.

deferredRisks.reason: Create-system idempotency still uses single-JVM memory storage. Production multi-instance consistency needs shared storage or a database idempotency table.
npm ci previously reported moderate audit items. Dependency governance should be handled separately to avoid forced upgrades during feature delivery.
OpenAPI nonce replay, IP whitelist, OpenAPI idempotency conflict and high-concurrency scenarios remain recommended before production launch.
Flow, file/export, OpenAPI, audit and ops still need real usable UI phases before full-project deployability can be claimed.

verification: FE-016 app/module UI completed with real browser operations
FE-017 field/page/publish UI completed with real browser operations
FE-018 runtime record UI completed with real browser operations
TEST-008 browser E2E passed for login, system enter, app, module, field, page config, publish, runtime create, detail, update, submit and history
npm.cmd run build passed and generated frontend/dist
mvn.cmd -pl examine-web -am -DskipTests package passed and generated backend/examine-web/target/unexamine.jar
fullProjectDeployable remains false because P11/P12 visual usable phases are not complete
